useNeoLegacyMigrationNotificationProcess.title: Neo Legacy migration is shutting down!

useBackupReminderNotificationProcess.notificationDescription: We recommend creating a new backup file in "More > Settings > Security > Backup NEON" to protect your wallets. For additional security, you can also export manually your mnemonics in "Wallet > 3 dots > Backup mnemonic" and private keys in "Wallet > Account > 3 dots > Export key".
